mapper.select: select * from course_resource where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1 order by published_at desc

select cr.* from course_resource cr join course c on c.id = cr.course_id where cr.course_id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cr.status = 1 and c.status = 1 order by cr.published_at desc
select course_id from course_resource where id = #{resourceId} and status = 1 limit 1
select count(1) from course_resource where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1

select cr.* from course_resource cr left join learning_progress lp on lp.resource_id = cr.id and lp.user_id = #{studentId} where cr.course_id = #{courseId} and cr.status = 1 and ( lp.id is null or lp.learn_status <> 2 or lp.progress_percent < 100 ) order by cr.published_at desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into course_resource( id, course_id, title, description, category, file_url, file_name, file_size, file_type, uploader_id, published_at, status ) values ( UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{uploaderId}, now(), 1 )

insert into learning_progress(id, resource_id, user_id, learn_status, progress_percent, last_viewed_at, updated_at) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{resourceId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{percent}, now(), now()) on duplicate key update learn_status = values(learn_status), progress_percent = values(progress_percent), last_viewed_at = values(last_viewed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)
